Env

rm(list = ls())
setwd("/Users/liqun/Desktop/scMutrace-tutorial/ReproducibilityAnalysis/Figure2/")

Libraries

library(pheatmap)
library(ggplot2)
library(circlize)

## circlize version 0.4.16

library(dplyr)

library(Seurat)

Load Data

cellLine_database <- readRDS("../Data/HumanCellline/CellLine_Database_res.rds")
cellLine_mutation <- readRDS("../Data/HumanCellline/CellLine_Mutation_res.rds")
cellLine_annotation <- read.csv("../Data/HumanCellline/CellLine_Annotation.csv", header = T, row.names = 1)
# remove KPL1 (SNP fingerprinting confirms that this line is an MCF-7 derivative. DepMap metadata has been updated (as of 22Q2) to reflect this.)
cellLine_annotation <- cellLine_annotation[!cellLine_annotation$cellLineName %in% c("KPL1"),]

cellLine_mutation$MCF7_MayC9 <- cellLine_mutation$MCF7_MayC9 %>%
  mutate(position_cor = sub("_[ACGT]+_[ACGT]+$", "", position_cor))
cellLine_mutation$MCF7_NovC9 <- cellLine_mutation$MCF7_NovC9 %>%
  mutate(position_cor = sub("_[ACGT]+_[ACGT]+$", "", position_cor))
cellLine_mutation$MCF7_Parental <- cellLine_mutation$MCF7_Parental %>%
  mutate(position_cor = sub("_[ACGT]+_[ACGT]+$", "", position_cor))
cellLine_mutation$MCF7_WT3 <- cellLine_mutation$MCF7_WT3 %>%
  mutate(position_cor = sub("_[ACGT]+_[ACGT]+$", "", position_cor))
cellLine_mutation$MCF7_WT4 <- cellLine_mutation$MCF7_WT4 %>%
  mutate(position_cor = sub("_[ACGT]+_[ACGT]+$", "", position_cor))
cellLine_mutation$MCF7_WT5 <- cellLine_mutation$MCF7_WT5 %>%
  mutate(position_cor = sub("_[ACGT]+_[ACGT]+$", "", position_cor))

processing

ann_data_new = data.frame(Groups=cellLine_annotation$ann)
rownames(ann_data_new) <- rownames(cellLine_annotation)
ann_colors = list(Groups = c(Bone="black", Breast="#ff7f00", Cervix = "#33a02c", Stomach = "#cab2d6",
                             Liver = "#a6cee3", Lung = "#e31a1c", Kidney = "#6a3d9a",
                             Skin = "#b15928", Brain = "#fdbf6f", Normal = "#ffff99"))

data_cell_lines <- do.call("rbind", cellLine_database)
# remove KPL1 (SNP fingerprinting confirms that this line is an MCF-7 derivative. DepMap metadata has been updated (as of 22Q2) to reflect this.)
data_cell_lines <- data_cell_lines[!data_cell_lines$cellLineName %in% c("KPL1"),]


data_scMut_lines <- do.call("rbind", cellLine_mutation)

scMut_lines <- unique(data_scMut_lines$cellLineName)
cellLine_Names <- unique(data_cell_lines$cellLineName)

data_sim_scmut <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = length(scMut_lines), ncol = length(cellLine_Names)))
rownames(data_sim_scmut) <- scMut_lines
colnames(data_sim_scmut) <- cellLine_Names

for (i in 1:length(cellLine_Names)){
  cellLine_name_tmp <- colnames(data_sim_scmut)[i]
  cellLine_name_tmp_pos <- data_cell_lines[data_cell_lines$cellLineName == cellLine_name_tmp,]$position_cor
  for(j in 1:length(scMut_lines)){
    scLine_name_tmp <- rownames(data_sim_scmut)[j]
    scmut_pos <- data_scMut_lines[data_scMut_lines$cellLineName == scLine_name_tmp,]$position_cor
    score_tmp <- length(intersect(scmut_pos, cellLine_name_tmp_pos)) / length(union(scmut_pos, cellLine_name_tmp_pos))
    data_sim_scmut[j, i] <- score_tmp
  }
}

data_scaled <- t(scale(t(as.matrix(data_sim_scmut))))

row_names_order <- c("KATOIII", "HGC1", "HGC2", "NCIN87", "SNU161", "SNU162", "NUGC4",
                       "SNU638", "MKN45", "SNU601_ATAC", "SNU601_RNA", "SNU668",
                    "MCF7_Parental",  "MCF7_WT3", "MCF7_WT4", "MCF7_WT5", "MCF7_MayC9", "MCF7_NovC9")

data_scaled <- data_scaled[row_names_order,]

max_val <- max(data_scaled)
min_val <- min(data_scaled)
breaks <- seq(min_val, max_val, length.out = 4)

col_fun_v1 <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  breaks,
  c("#404040", "#bababa", "#f4a582", "#ca0020")
)

p_total <- pheatmap(data_scaled, 
                    cluster_rows = FALSE, cluster_cols = FALSE, 
                    annotation_col = ann_data_new, 
                    annotation_colors = ann_colors, 
                    color = col_fun_v1,
                   cellheight = 20, cellwidth = 0.5, show_colnames = FALSE)
## Warning: Column annotation has different order from matrix columns. Adjust the
## column annotation based on column names of the matrix.

p_total

selectedCelllines

marked_celllines <- c("HGC27", "KATOIII", "MKN45","NCIN87", "NUGC4", "SNU16","SNU601", "SNU638", "SNU668")

normalCellLines <- unique(cellLine_database$Normal$cellLineName)

stomachCellLines <- unique(cellLine_database$Stomach$cellLineName)[unique(cellLine_database$Stomach$cellLineName) %in% marked_celllines]

selected_cellLines <- c("A549", "JHU028", "LK2",
                        "NOS1", "CHLA10", "U251MG", "U251MGDM", "MCF7", "T47D",
                        "HELA", "HOKUG", "786O", "ACHN", "HEPG2", "HUH7",
                        "SKMEL5", "MEWO", 
                        #"SKGT2","HGC27", "KATOIII", "MKN45","NCIN87", "NUGC4", "SNU16","SNU601", "SNU638", "SNU668",
                        normalCellLines, stomachCellLines)

ann_data_new = data.frame(Groups=cellLine_annotation$ann)

rownames(ann_data_new) <- rownames(cellLine_annotation)

ann_colors = list(Groups = c(Bone="black", Breast="#ff7f00", Cervix = "#33a02c", Stomach = "#cab2d6",
                             Liver = "#a6cee3", Lung = "#e31a1c", Kidney = "#6a3d9a",
                             Skin = "#b15928", Brain = "#fdbf6f", Normal = "#ffff99"))

data_sim_scmut_selected <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = length(scMut_lines), ncol = length(selected_cellLines)))
rownames(data_sim_scmut_selected) <- scMut_lines
colnames(data_sim_scmut_selected) <- selected_cellLines


for (i in 1:length(selected_cellLines)){
  cellLine_name_tmp <- colnames(data_sim_scmut_selected)[i]
  cellLine_name_tmp_pos <- data_cell_lines[data_cell_lines$cellLineName == cellLine_name_tmp,]$position_cor
  for(j in 1:length(scMut_lines)){
    scLine_name_tmp <- rownames(data_sim_scmut_selected)[j]
    scmut_pos <- data_scMut_lines[data_scMut_lines$cellLineName == scLine_name_tmp,]$position_cor
    score_tmp <- length(intersect(scmut_pos, cellLine_name_tmp_pos)) / length(union(scmut_pos, cellLine_name_tmp_pos))
    data_sim_scmut_selected[j, i] <- score_tmp
  }
}

data_scaled_selected <- t(scale(t(as.matrix(data_sim_scmut_selected))))

data_scaled_selected <- data_scaled_selected[row_names_order,]

max_val <- max(data_scaled_selected)
min_val <- min(data_scaled_selected)
breaks <- seq(min_val, max_val, length.out = 4)

col_fun_v1 <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  breaks,
  c("#404040", "#bababa", "#f4a582", "#ca0020")
)

p_selected <- Heatmap(data_scaled_selected,
        name = "score",
        col = col_fun_v1,
        cluster_rows = FALSE,
        cluster_columns = FALSE,
        show_column_names = TRUE,
        row_names_side = "left",
        column_names_side = "bottom")

p_selected

MCF7MutSim

MCF7_colnames <- c("MCF7_MayC9", "MCF7_NovC9", "MCF7_Parental", "MCF7_WT3", "MCF7_WT4", "MCF7_WT5")
data_sim_scmut_MCF7 <- as.data.frame(matrix(nrow = length(MCF7_colnames), ncol = length(MCF7_colnames)))
rownames(data_sim_scmut_MCF7) <- MCF7_colnames
colnames(data_sim_scmut_MCF7) <- MCF7_colnames


for (i in 1:length(MCF7_colnames)){
  cellLine_name_tmp <- colnames(data_sim_scmut_MCF7)[i]
  cellLine_name_tmp_pos <- data_scMut_lines[data_scMut_lines$cellLineName == cellLine_name_tmp,]$position_cor
  for(j in 1:length(MCF7_colnames)){
    scLine_name_tmp <- rownames(data_sim_scmut_MCF7)[j]
    scmut_pos <- data_scMut_lines[data_scMut_lines$cellLineName == scLine_name_tmp,]$position_cor
    score_tmp <- length(intersect(scmut_pos, cellLine_name_tmp_pos)) / length(union(scmut_pos, cellLine_name_tmp_pos))
    data_sim_scmut_MCF7[j, i] <- score_tmp
  }
}

data_scaled_MCF7 <- t(scale(t(as.matrix(data_sim_scmut_MCF7))))

max_val <- max(data_sim_scmut_MCF7)
min_val <- min(data_sim_scmut_MCF7)
breaks <- seq(min_val, max_val, length.out = 4)

col_fun_v1 <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  breaks,
  c("#404040", "#bababa", "#f4a582", "#ca0020")
)

p_selected_MCF7 <- Heatmap(data_sim_scmut_MCF7,
        name = "score",
        col = col_fun_v1,
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        cluster_columns = TRUE,
        show_column_names = TRUE,
        row_names_side = "left",
        column_names_side = "bottom")
## Warning: The input is a data frame-like object, convert it to a matrix.

p_selected_MCF7

How to generate MCF7_merge_exp.rds

# load data
MCF7_Parental <- Read10X("../data/exp/MCF7_Parent/") # note the folder name is "MCF7_Parent", output of cell ranger
MCF7_WT3 <- Read10X("../data/exp/MCF7_WT3/") # note the folder name is "MCF7_WT3", output of cell ranger
MCF7_WT4 <- Read10X("../data/exp/MCF7_WT4/") # note the folder name is "MCF7_WT4", output of cell ranger
MCF7_WT5 <- Read10X("../data/exp/MCF7_WT5/") # note the folder name is "MCF7_WT5", output of cell ranger

MCF7_May <- Read10X("../data/exp/MCF7_MayC9/") # note the folder name is "MCF7_MayC9", output of cell ranger
MCF7_Nov <- Read10X("../data/exp/MCF7_NovC9/") # note the folder name is "MCF7_NovC9", output of cell ranger

MCF7_Parental <- CreateSeuratObject(MCF7_Parental, project = "MCF7_Parental")
MCF7_WT3 <- CreateSeuratObject(MCF7_WT3, project = "MCF7_WT3")
MCF7_WT4 <- CreateSeuratObject(MCF7_WT4, project = "MCF7_WT4")
MCF7_WT5 <- CreateSeuratObject(MCF7_WT5, project = "MCF7_WT5")

MCF7_May <- CreateSeuratObject(MCF7_May, project = "MCF7_May")
MCF7_Nov <- CreateSeuratObject(MCF7_Nov, project = "MCF7_Nov")
# filter 
# Cells with either <1,000 detected genes or >0.15 mitochondrial fraction were excluded from further analysis.
# Finally, the resulting expression matrix was filtered to remove genes detected in <3 cells.
filter_scRNA_sample <- function(obj, 
                                min_genes = 1000, 
                                max_mt = 15, 
                                min_cells_per_gene = 3,
                                mt_pattern = "^MT-") {
  
  stopifnot("Seurat" %in% class(obj))
  
  obj[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(obj, pattern = mt_pattern)
  
  obj <- subset(obj, subset = nFeature_RNA >= min_genes & percent.mt <= max_mt)
  
  counts_mat <- GetAssayData(obj, assay = "RNA", slot = "counts")
  
  gene_filter <- Matrix::rowSums(counts_mat > 0) >= min_cells_per_gene
  
  obj <- obj[which(gene_filter), ]
  
  return(obj)
}

MCF7_Parental <- filter_scRNA_sample(MCF7_Parental)
MCF7_WT3 <- filter_scRNA_sample(MCF7_WT3)
MCF7_WT4 <- filter_scRNA_sample(MCF7_WT4)
MCF7_WT5 <- filter_scRNA_sample(MCF7_WT5)
MCF7_May <- filter_scRNA_sample(MCF7_May)
MCF7_Nov <- filter_scRNA_sample(MCF7_Nov)

MCF7_Parental$sample <- "Parental"
MCF7_WT3$sample <- "WT3"
MCF7_WT4$sample <- "WT4"
MCF7_WT5$sample <- "WT5"
MCF7_May$sample <- "May"
MCF7_Nov$sample <- "Nov"

# merge
MCF7_Merge <- merge(MCF7_Parental, y = c(MCF7_WT3, MCF7_WT4, MCF7_WT5, MCF7_May, MCF7_Nov), add.cell.ids = c("Parental", "WT3", "WT4", "WT5", "May", "Nov"), project = "MCF7_merge")

MCF7_Merge <- NormalizeData(MCF7_Merge)
MCF7_Merge <- FindVariableFeatures(MCF7_Merge)
MCF7_Merge <- ScaleData(MCF7_Merge)
MCF7_Merge <- RunPCA(MCF7_Merge)
MCF7_Merge <- RunUMAP(MCF7_Merge, dims = 1:20)
MCF7_Merge <- RunTSNE(MCF7_Merge, dims = 1:20)

my_colors <- c(
  "May"     = "#D73027",
  "Nov"     = "#FC8D59",
  "Parental"  = "#7F7F7F",
  "WT3"       = "#4575B4",
  "WT4"       = "#74ADD1",
  "WT5"       = "#ABD9E9"
)

DimPlot(
  MCF7_Merge,
  group.by = "sample",
  cols = my_colors,
  reduction = "umap",
) +
  ggtitle("UMAP of MCF7 samples") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

DimPlot(
  MCF7_Merge,
  group.by = "sample",
  cols = my_colors,
  reduction = "tsne",
) +
  ggtitle("tsne of MCF7 samples") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)
saveRDS(MCF7_Merge, file = "../Data/HumanCellline/MCF7_merge_exp.rds")

# generate data for visualization
MCF7_Merge_meta <- MCF7_Merge@meta.data
MCF7_Merge_meta$cell_id <- rownames(MCF7_Merge_meta)
MCF7_Merge_pca <- Embeddings(MCF7_exp, "pca")[, 1:20]
MCF7_Merge_tSNE <- as.data.frame(MCF7_Merge@reductions$tsne@cell.embeddings)
MCF7_Merge_tSNE$cell_id <- rownames(MCF7_Merge_tSNE)
MCF7_Merge_meta_tTSNE <- merge(MCF7_Merge_meta, MCF7_Merge_tSNE, by = "cell_id")
MCF7_exp_data <- list(meta = MCF7_Merge_meta_tTSNE,
                     pca = MCF7_Merge_pca)
saveRDS(MCF7_exp_data, file = "../Data/HumanCellline/MCF7_exp_data.rds")

MCF7ExpSim

MCF7_exp <- readRDS("../Data/HumanCellline/MCF7_exp_data.rds")

my_colors <- c(
  "May"       = "#D73027",
  "Nov"       = "#FC8D59",
  "Parental"  = "#7F7F7F",
  "WT3"       = "#4575B4",
  "WT4"       = "#74ADD1",
  "WT5"       = "#ABD9E9"
)

p_tSNE <- ggplot(MCF7_exp$meta, aes(x = tSNE_1, y = tSNE_2, color = sample)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.5, alpha = 0.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_colors) +
  theme_classic()
p_tSNE


# distance
pca_data <- MCF7_exp$pca
meta <- MCF7_exp$meta

avg_pca <- as.data.frame(pca_data) %>%
  mutate(group = meta$orig.ident) %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), mean))

dist_mat <- dist(avg_pca[,-1])
dist_mat <- as.matrix(dist_mat)
rownames(dist_mat) <- avg_pca$group
colnames(dist_mat) <- avg_pca$group

max_val <- max(dist_mat)
min_val <- min(dist_mat)
breaks <- seq(min_val, max_val, length.out = 4)

col_fun_v1 <- circlize::colorRamp2(
  breaks,
  c("#ca0020", "#f4a582",   "#bababa", "#404040")
)

p_selected_MCF7_exp <- Heatmap(dist_mat,
        name = "Euclidean distance",
        col = col_fun_v1,
        cluster_rows = TRUE,
        cluster_columns = TRUE,
        show_column_names = TRUE,
        row_names_side = "left",
        column_names_side = "bottom")

p_selected_MCF7_exp
